stemHtml: You are flying on a cross country VFR flight and notice that you cannot hear other stations but they can most likely hear you (receiver issue). How do you proceed?

options.a: I will start my transmissions with “Transmitting blind due to receiver failure” and state my intentions and next transmission time/location, saying this twice and all subsequent transmissions will be only be said once.
options.b: I will start my transmissions with “Transmitting blind due to receiver failure” and state my intentions and next transmission time/location, saying this twice and all subsequent transmissions will be repeated twice.
options.c: I will start my transmission with “Transmitting blind due to receiver failure” only on my first call and will then continue communications normally, providing only position reports.
options.d: I will start my transmission with “Transmitting blind due to receiver failure” only on my first call and will then continue communications normally, providing only position reports and my intentions.
